common.noResultsHint: Try widening the search or clearing one of the filters.

dataState.errorDescription: Check your connection and try again. If it keeps failing, let us know.

adminEmployees.title: Employees
adminEmployees.subtitle: Manage employee accounts, departments, and role assignments.
adminEmployees.createDescription: Create an account and assign initial roles. The employee can sign in immediately.
adminEmployees.rolesHelp: An employee's effective permissions are the union of every role assigned.
adminEmployees.passwordReset: Password reset. The employee must sign in again.
adminEmployees.resetPasswordHelp: Set a new password. This signs the employee out of all devices.
adminEmployees.noManageHint: You do not have permission to manage this employee.

field.legacyRoleHint: Drives the legacy sidebar and token role during RBAC migration. Real access comes from assigned roles.

adminRoles.title: Roles & permissions
adminRoles.subtitle: Build roles from the permission catalog and assign them to employees.
adminRoles.deleteBlocked: Unassign this role from all employees first.
adminRoles.confirmDelete: Delete the role "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
adminRoles.formDescription: Name the role. Set its permissions from the permission matrix.
adminRoles.permissionsHelp: Toggle each action and choose its data scope where applicable.
adminRoles.permissionsReadOnly: This is a system role and cannot be modified.

adminDepartments.title: Departments
adminDepartments.subtitle: Organize employees into departments and designate managers.
adminDepartments.formDescription: Departments are org units used for data scoping and routing.

field.name: Name
field.managerHint: The manager must be a member of this department.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Latest alerts and events for you.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Every sensitive operation in the system is logged here.

gov.title: Government transactions
gov.subtitle: Manage filings with authorities, municipalities, and platforms (Etimad, Fursa).
gov.dashboardSubtitle: Read-only view of every government filing across all projects, grouped by status.
gov.statusBoardNoticeTitle: This is a status board for previously filed applications.
gov.statusBoardNoticeBody: New licence applications are now opened from inside the relevant project's Licences tab. Use this board to monitor progress on filings already in flight.

visit.heading: PRO visits
visit.sameDay: Visits must be logged on the same calendar day they occurred (BR-16).

weeklyStatus.overdueWarning: Transaction status has not been updated this week

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Validate payments, issue invoices, approve commercial confirmations.

commercial.confirmValidate: Validate — this will mint the PO immediately.
commercial.confirmReject: Reject and return the quote to the sales rep

project.title: Projects
project.subtitle: Manage projects from planning through closure.
project.emptyCta: Start by creating your first project from an active PO.

gantt.title: Project Gantt
gantt.subtitle: Planned vs. actual timeline. Today line in blue.
gantt.empty: No phases scheduled yet. Add a phase from the Phases tab to start planning.

dialog.newSubtitle: Project is created from the selected purchase order with 7 default phases.
dialog.noAvailablePos: No active purchase orders without projects.
dialog.poHint: Only ACTIVE purchase orders without an attached project are shown here.
dialog.seedPhasesHint: When on, all seven canonical phases are pre-created with the PM as owner and rolling planned dates.

resources.title: Resource Workload
resources.subtitle: Current workload per employee across active projects.

phase.evidenceHint: Either a signed-off note (50+ chars) or a client acknowledgement date is required (BR-14).

dialogs.addPhaseDescription: Add a custom phase or any of the canonical phases.
dialogs.taskAssigneeHint: Defaults to the phase owner when left blank.
dialogs.addDependencySubtitle: This task cannot start until the selected blocker is DONE.
dialogs.reassignOwnerSubtitle: Each phase has exactly one owner (BR-13).
dialogs.reassignOwnerReasonHint: Minimum 10 characters — recorded on the phase history.
dialogs.confirmCompleteSubtitle: Evidence required (BR-14): signed-off note (50+ chars) or client acknowledgement date.

closurePanel.roleHintPm: This gate needs PM or Admin.
closurePanel.roleHintFinance: This gate needs Finance or Admin.

closure.title: Project closure checklist
closure.subtitle: All five gates must be satisfied before the project can close (PART 7).

rfq.title: Requests for Quotation
rfq.subtitle: Track RFQs from receipt through dispatch and outcome.
rfq.mustBeReadyForRfq: Opportunity must be in READY_FOR_RFQ first.

legacyAssignments.title: Legacy assignments (pre-2026-05-21)
legacyAssignments.description: The old three-user assignment model. Kept visible for in-flight RFQs created under the previous process; new RFQs use the per-department Lead Pricer model above.

list.title: My Requests
list.subtitle: Quotes you've raised — track them and act when something's waiting on you.

empty.firstBody: When you need a price for a client, raise it from their lead. It'll show up here and we'll keep you posted as the departments work it up.
empty.caughtUp: You're all caught up. Nothing's waiting on you.

list.error: We couldn't load your requests. Check your connection and try again.

tracker.notFound: We couldn't find this request. It may have been cancelled or you may not have access.

asks.title: Open asks · {count}
asks.subtitle: The pricing team needs this from you before they can move forward.
asks.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

doc.label: Document
doc.tooBig: That file is too large (max 10 MB).
doc.badType: Only images (PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF) or PDF files are allowed.

timeline.passedBack: Passed back to you — the pricing team couldn't take this as routed. Re-route it to the right department.
timeline.noBid: The department reviewed this and won't bid. See their reason below.

reroute.title: Came back to you
reroute.subtitle: This was routed to the wrong department. Fix the departments and send it back.
reroute.noBidHeading: The department won't bid on this.
reroute.error: None of those departments can take this. Pick at least one with an active pricing team.

quote.title: Quote
quote.notYet: No quote yet — the pricing team is still working it up.
quote.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
quote.sendConfirm: This marks the quote as sent to {client}. You'll then be able to record the outcome.
quote.recordOutcome: The client has the quote. Record the outcome when they reply:
quote.wonConfirm: Mark this quote as won? This converts the opportunity to a project.
quote.preparing: The quote is still being finalised by the pricing team.

profile.title: Personal settings
profile.subtitle: Customise language, calendar, and notifications.
profile.quietHoursHelper: Push notifications are suppressed during this window.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your ABAK ERP account.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create a new ABAK ERP account.
auth.asideDescription: Leads, CRM, pipelines, quotations, and marketing — one system.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Lead health at a glance. Pipeline, quote, and marketing widgets land with their respective sprints.

list.title: Leads
list.subtitle: Track every incoming opportunity across all six channels.

requestRfq.title: Request an RFQ
requestRfq.description: Submitting this will qualify {leadNumber}, create the client if needed, and open an RFQ for the departments derived from the services you pick.
requestRfq.servicesHint: Pick every service the client needs — the involved departments are derived from your selection.
requestRfq.noServices: No services in the catalog yet.
requestRfq.scopePlaceholder: Short brief of what the client needs (min 10 chars).
requestRfq.departmentsHint: Derived automatically from the selected services.
requestRfq.departmentsEmpty: Select services above to see the departments that will price this RFQ.
requestRfq.hintAddScope: add a project brief (at least 10 characters)
requestRfq.successToast: {rfqNumber} created · lead qualified — assigned to the department manager(s) for triage

quotePdf.printHint: Use "Save as PDF" in the print dialog.
quotePdf.noItems: No line items on this quote.

holidays.title: Public holidays
holidays.subtitle: These dates are excluded from working-day calculations.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reports.catalogDescription: Browse and run all system reports

list.title: Clients
list.subtitle: 360° view of every account the team manages.

detail.archiveDescription: The client stays in the database but disappears from the active list. Interactions and follow-ups stay intact for audit.

interactionDialog.title: Log an interaction
interactionDialog.description: Every call, meeting, and message lands on the 360° timeline.
interactionDialog.subject: Subject

editDialog.title: Edit {clientNumber}
editDialog.description: Update contact, address, and account details.

noteDialog.title: Add note
noteDialog.description: Tag important facts so account managers find them quickly.

followUpDialog.title: Schedule follow-up
followUpDialog.description: Pick a date and (optionally) the teammate who owns the action.
followUpDialog.fieldsRequired: Title and due date are required

classifyDialog.title: Reclassify
classifyDialog.description: Locking the classification prevents the auto-classifier from changing it.

closeFollowUpDialog.title: Close follow-up
closeFollowUpDialog.noteMinLength: Closure note must be at least 10 characters
closeFollowUpDialog.cancelReasonPlaceholder: Write the reason for cancelling this follow-up
closeFollowUpDialog.autoRescheduleHint: A new follow-up will be auto-created after 3 days.

executive.title: Executive dashboard
executive.subtitle: Cross-team snapshot — sales, projects, finance and government.
executive.noTargets: No targets set for this month

targets.title: Team targets
targets.subtitle: Manage team targets and track achievement.
targets.byRepHint: Click a cell to set or edit the target

pipelineUi.title: Sales pipeline
pipelineUi.subtitle: Every opportunity across all nine stages.
pipelineUi.reasonRequiredLost: A reason is required for LOST
pipelineUi.logVisitDescription: Record the visit details — an interaction will be auto-created in the CRM.
pipelineUi.discussionPlaceholder: Visit topic and main discussion points
pipelineUi.nextActionPlaceholder: What action is required after this visit?
pipelineUi.rfqDescription: All five criteria must be confirmed to proceed
pipelineUi.rfqCriterion2: Service or project type clearly defined
pipelineUi.rfqCriterion5: Required documents available or formally committed

quoteDetail.noApprovalsRequired: No approvals required at this amount.
quoteDetail.rejectQuoteDesc: Optionally record why the client rejected this quote.

projectDetail.progressWarning: Warning: project progress exceeds collected payments — please review the payment schedule.

leadNew.heading: New lead
leadNew.subheading: Pick the channel the opportunity came through, then fill in the details.
leadNew.channelLabel: How did this lead come in?
leadNew.channelHint: Pick the channel — it tailors the fields below.

quoteList.title: Quotes
quoteList.subtitle: Draft, approve, send, and accept client proposals.
quoteList.noQuotesDesc: Quotes are created from RFQs, or directly from a client card.
quoteList.noMatchesDesc: Try widening the search or clearing the status filter.

detail.archiveLeadDesc: The lead stays in the database but is hidden from the list. This is reversible by support only.

comms.title: Communications log
comms.noContactYet: No contact logged yet — the clock is ticking.
comms.emptyTimeline: No entries yet. Log every call, WhatsApp, email, meeting, or site visit so the next person on this lead has full context.
comms.sheetDescription: Every contact with the prospect — call, WhatsApp, email, meeting, site visit — belongs on this timeline. The next person to touch this lead reads it first.
comms.subjectPlaceholder: e.g. Initial discovery call — interested in supervision
comms.notesPlaceholder: What was discussed, what was promised, what they need next…
comms.followUpHint: Inline reminder — appears on your follow-up queue.
comms.subjectError: Add a brief subject (at least 2 characters).

rfqRequests.docRequestsDescription: Ask the sales person for additional documents from the client (CAD, soil report, site photos, contract clarifications…).
rfqRequests.docRequestsEmpty: No document requests yet. Raise one above if anything is missing.
rfqRequests.siteVisitsDescription: Need to walk the site before pricing? The sales person makes the first contact; after that you can coordinate logistics with the client directly (CC sales for the record).
rfqRequests.requestDocumentDescription: Be specific — the sales person will forward this verbatim to the client.
rfqRequests.docDescPlaceholder: e.g. "Updated CAD plan with the new mezzanine, soil-test report from the geotechnical survey."
rfqRequests.requestSiteVisitDescription: Explain why a visit is needed and an optional date window. The sales person makes the first call; logistics with the client can then go direct.
rfqRequests.purposePlaceholder: e.g. "Need to verify column spacing & assess existing MEP risers before pricing structural retrofit."
rfqRequests.schedulePrompt: Scheduled at (YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm). Leave empty to skip.
rfqRequests.toastDocRequestRaised: Request raised. Sales person will be notified.
rfqRequests.toastSiteVisitRaised: Site-visit request raised. Sales person will reach out.

pricerAssignments.title: Pricer assignments per department
pricerAssignments.description: One row per department involved. Designate exactly one engineer as the Lead Pricer — they assemble + submit the consolidated quote; others fill their own section only.
pricerAssignments.empty: No pricers assigned yet. Add the first one below.
pricerAssignments.noLeadWarning: No Lead Pricer designated. Tap the <star></star> on one row so the quote can be submitted for approval.
pricerAssignments.tooManyLeadsWarning: {count} Lead Pricers designated — should be exactly 1. Toggle the <star></star> off on the duplicate rows.
pricerAssignments.removeLeadBlockedTitle: Designate another assignee as Lead Pricer first

licencesTab.listDescription: Project-scoped. Add the licence when applying on the portal; track status here. Wire it to a phase to hard-block that phase from starting until it's issued.
licencesTab.emptyState: No licences on this project yet. Add the first one when you file the application on Balady / Salama / MODON / etc.
licencesTab.projectPaused: Project paused — waiting on {count, plural, one {# licence} other {# licences}}.
licencesTab.projectPausedDetail: Phases dependent on non-issued licences are hard-blocked from starting. Pause time is excluded from slip math.
licencesTab.ceoOverrideDescription: Only the CEO can let a phase start before its blocking licence is issued. The justification is permanently logged for audit.
licencesTab.waitingOnLicence: Waiting on licence to be issued
licencesTab.clearOverrideConfirm: Clear this CEO override? The phase will go back to being blocked until the licence is issued.
licencesTab.grantOverrideDescription: Allow {phase} to start before its blocking licence is issued. This decision is permanently logged with your name and timestamp.
licencesTab.justificationPlaceholder: e.g. Permit submission delayed by authority; mobilization can proceed because client has issued a written go-ahead and accepts liability.
licencesTab.justificationMinError: Justification must be at least 20 characters.
licencesTab.addLicenceDescription: Record the application you just filed on the government portal. You can wire it to phases below to hard-block phase start until the licence is issued.
licencesTab.licenceNamePlaceholder: e.g. Building Permit, Civil Defense Approval
licencesTab.portalUrlHelp: The team will click this to check status on the portal.
licencesTab.blockPhasesHelp: Pick phases that cannot start until this licence is issued.
licencesTab.editDependenciesDescription: Pick the phases that cannot start until {licence} is issued.
licencesTab.noPhasesYet: No phases on this project yet.

installPrompt.message: Install ABAK ERP for faster access
